_publications._publicationTitle: MIA is a potential biomarker for tumour load in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: qRT-PCR revealed a more than twofold increase of Mia expression in Nf1Prx1-deficient cartilage
details: More than twofold increase of Mia expression in Nf1Prx1-deficient cartilage compared to wild-type tissue
